pricing: weETH/USD from Pyth divided by USDC/USD from Pyth, both via PythAggregatorV3 Chainlink-compatible adapters, scaled to 1e36.
notes: BROKEN: Pyth BASE_FEED_1 (weETH/USD at 0x4429b7...) was last updated 62 days ago (2026-03-22) as of 2026-05-24. The PythAggregatorV3 does not enforce staleness — latestRoundData() silently returns multi-month-old prices without reverting. MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 performs no independent freshness check. This means the oracle price is frozen at a 2-month-old value and will not reflect real-time weETH movements until a keeper pushes a Pyth update on-chain. During any weETH volatility, positions can go deeply underwater without triggering liquidations. The 62-day observation is a live on-chain fact, not hypothetical. Avoid this oracle until staleness is addressed.
